message:
Validate FrankenSearch release tag + fall back to GitHub redirect

The FrankenSearch version resolver previously treated any non-empty
string from the GitHub releases API as a valid tag. That silently
accepted garbage (e.g. HTML error pages containing the tag word,
rate-limit responses, or unset ACFS_FSFS_VERSION overrides like
"../v1.2.5") and passed it straight through to downstream curl +
tar commands, which could break the install or — in the worst case —
expand path components from an attacker-controlled override.

Harden the resolver in both scripts/lib/stack.sh and scripts/lib/update.sh:

- Introduce a shared predicate (`_stack_is_valid_fsfs_version` /
  `update_is_valid_fsfs_version`) that requires the regex
  `^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$` — i.e. a leading `v`, a numeric first
  character, and only tag-safe characters thereafter. This rejects
  path traversal payloads and malformed/empty values up front.
- Apply the predicate to `ACFS_FSFS_VERSION` overrides. A bogus
  override now returns 1 instead of being passed through.
- When the api.github.com `tag_name` lookup returns something that
  doesn't match the predicate, fall back to resolving the effective
  URL of `github.com/.../releases/latest` and parsing the tag out of
  `…/tag/<tag>`. The redirect path does not require an authenticated
  API call, so it survives low-rate-limit environments where the JSON
  endpoint is refused.
- Apply the same validation on the fallback value before returning.

Mirror the same fallback-then-validate logic into the generated
verified installer snippet emitted by packages/manifest/src/generate.ts
so baked-in installers gain the resilience without an ACFS upgrade,
and bake the updated `scripts/lib/update.sh` SHA into
scripts/generated/internal_checksums.sh so the self-verify guard
remains green.

Tests:
- generate.test.ts asserts the new regex guard and the redirect URL
  both appear in the emitted install_stack.sh payload.
- test_update.bats adds two bats cases: one stubbing curl so the API
  path 22-fails and the redirect parser must recover `v1.2.5`, and
  one asserting a `../v1.2.5` override is rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1140,9 +1140,12 @@ function generateVerifiedInstallerSnippet(module: Module): string[] {
     '                        fsfs_version="$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION"',
     '                    else',
     '                        fsfs_version="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" "https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest" 2>/dev/null | sed -n \'s/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\\([^"]*\\)".*/\\1/p\' | head -n 1 || true)"',
+    '                        if [[ ! "$fsfs_version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then',
+    '                            fsfs_version="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -o /dev/null -w \'%{url_effective}\' "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest" 2>/dev/null | sed -E \'s|.*/tag/||\' || true)"',
+    '                        fi',
     '                    fi',
     '',
-    '                    if [[ -z "$fsfs_version" ]]; then',
+    '                    if [[ ! "$fsfs_version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then',
     '                        fsfs_can_run=false',
     `                        log_warn "${escapeBash(module.id)}: unable to resolve FrankenSearch release; skipping source-build fallback"`,
     '                    else',

@@ -2134,9 +2134,12 @@ install_stack_frankensearch() {
                                     fsfs_version="$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION"
                                 else
                                     fsfs_version="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" "https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest" 2>/dev/null | sed -n 's/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -n 1 || true)"
+                                    if [[ ! "$fsfs_version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then
+                                        fsfs_version="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's|.*/tag/||' || true)"
+                                    fi
                                 fi
 
-                                if [[ -z "$fsfs_version" ]]; then
+                                if [[ ! "$fsfs_version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then
                                     fsfs_can_run=false
                                     log_warn "stack.frankensearch: unable to resolve FrankenSearch release; skipping source-build fallback"
                                 else

@@ -807,19 +807,34 @@ _stack_fsfs_linux_target_triple() {
     esac
 }
 
+_stack_is_valid_fsfs_version() {
+    local version="${1:-}"
+    [[ "$version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]
+}
+
 _stack_resolve_fsfs_latest_version() {
     if [[ -n "${ACFS_FSFS_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
+        _stack_is_valid_fsfs_version "$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION" || return 1
         printf '%s\n' "$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION"
         return 0
     fi
 
     local latest_url="https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest"
+    local redirect_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest"
     local tag=""
     tag="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" "$latest_url" 2>/dev/null \
         | sed -n 's/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' \
         | head -n 1 || true)"
 
-    [[ -n "$tag" ]] || return 1
+    if _stack_is_valid_fsfs_version "$tag"; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$tag"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    tag="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "$redirect_url" 2>/dev/null \
+        | sed -E 's|.*/tag/||' || true)"
+
+    _stack_is_valid_fsfs_version "$tag" || return 1
     printf '%s\n' "$tag"
 }

@@ -2671,19 +2671,34 @@ update_fsfs_linux_target_triple() {
     esac
 }
 
+update_is_valid_fsfs_version() {
+    local version="${1:-}"
+    [[ "$version" =~ ^v[0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]
+}
+
 update_resolve_fsfs_latest_version() {
     if [[ -n "${ACFS_FSFS_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
+        update_is_valid_fsfs_version "$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION" || return 1
         printf '%s\n' "$ACFS_FSFS_VERSION"
         return 0
     fi
 
     local latest_url="https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest"
+    local redirect_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch/releases/latest"
     local tag=""
     tag="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" "$latest_url" 2>/dev/null \
         | sed -n 's/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' \
         | head -n 1 || true)"
 
-    [[ -n "$tag" ]] || return 1
+    if update_is_valid_fsfs_version "$tag"; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$tag"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    tag="$(curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 60 -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "$redirect_url" 2>/dev/null \
+        | sed -E 's|.*/tag/||' || true)"
+
+    update_is_valid_fsfs_version "$tag" || return 1
     printf '%s\n' "$tag"
 }
